message: Direct "npm:zod" import is not allowed — add a # alias in deno.json and import via the alias instead
"../" import is not allowed — use an @ alias instead (../../../../shared/helper.ts)
Module has only one business feature (widget) — it may not need its own module
Module only has 2 source files — consider merging it into a related module
Module only uses 1 layer(s) (business) — consider merging into a module that uses more of the architecture
Cross-module import from "app" into "shared" is forbidden — extract shared code to core/ instead (src/shared/helper.ts)
Missing required file "mod-root" (.ts) — public API, only external import surface

This folder is not allowed by the project structure spec

Expected structure:
  Folders: <feature>/
This file is not allowed here — parent folder is not in the spec
"shared" contains loose/vague word "shared" — use a more specific name

This folder is not allowed by the project structure spec

Expected structure:
  Isolated module — imports only from core or itself
  Folders: domain/, entrypoints/, dto/
  mod-root.ts — public API, only external import surface
